# getValidatorChangesInfo

Returns a list of validators whose status changed in the most recent era.

## Import

```ts
import { RpcClient, HttpHandler } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Usage

```ts
const result = await rpcClient.getValidatorChangesInfo();

for (const change of result.changes) {
  console.log('Validator:', change.publicKey.toHex());
  console.log('Status changes:', change.statusChanges);
}
```

## Return Value

`Promise<InfoGetValidatorChangesResult>`

```ts
interface InfoGetValidatorChangesResult {
  changes: ValidatorChange[];
}
```
